title: embelia frangulifolia
intro: Embelia frangulifolia, also known as Embelia or Punnar Pushpi, is a plant species belonging to the family Primulaceae. The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Embelia frangulifolia include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Embelia frangulifolia include powder, decoction, and juice, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
